title: Crispy Bacon Crunchy Japanese Salad
description: A refreshing salad with crunchy textures, smoky bacon, and Japanese flavors.
instructions: 1. Cook the Japanese rice according to package instructions.
2. In a pan, cook the crispy bacon over medium heat until crispy. Remove from heat and set aside.
3. In a separate pan, heat 1 tablespoon of soy sauce over low heat. Add the chopped green onions and cook until softened.
4. In a large bowl, combine the cooked Japanese rice, crispy bacon, edamame, sesame sticks, and green onion mixture.
5. In a small bowl, whisk together the remaining soy sauce, rice vinegar, sugar, and sesame seeds. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss to combine.
7. Serve immediately and garnish with additional sesame seeds if desired.
